channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jimmy Butler returns from suspension, plays Friday for Miami against Denver
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler got introduced to the Miami Heat crowd for the first time in two weeks Friday night. Not everyone seemed thrilled.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Charley Hoffman, Rico Hoey charge into the lead midway through The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Charley Hoffman knows his time on the PGA Tour is running short. He can feel every one of his 48 years whenever his troublesome back acts up, and he knows the recent reduction in tour cards will end most players’ careers well before they reach his age.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield to remain in prison for now after judge denies bail ruling
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield, whose 2020 rape conviction was vacated late last year, will remain in California state prison for now after a judge declined to make a bail ruling Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mojo fan gifts head coach handmade jacket
item.description: “Aside from an Olympic medal, and we had to earn that one, this is probably one of the best gifts I've ever received,” San Diego Mojo head coach Tayyiba Haneef-Park said.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys interview Eagles' Kellen Moore, 1st formal step in search to replace Mike McCarthy
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys completed a virtual interview Friday with Philadelphia offensive coordinator Kellen Moore, the first formal step in the search to replace former coach Mike McCarthy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Notre Dame and Ohio State arrive in Atlanta and it's the 2nd visit of the season for Fighting Irish
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Ohio State and Notre Dame arrived in Atlanta on charter flights Friday as the teams moved closer to the College Football Playoff national championship game Monday night. The Buckeyes are big favorites but the Fighting Irish might have an advantage.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox exec calls Brady rumors "a never-ending, merry-go-round" of narratives
item.description: Even as Tom Brady goes through his first postseason and prepares to call his first Super Bowl as a television analyst in three weeks, rumors about his future continue to be rampant, much to the dismay of Fox Sports.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says he intends to sign with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: IMSA brings 27 STEM-focused high school students to Daytona to learn about jobs in motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Sebastian Ray Serpa, a 16-year-old high school student from Volusia County, passes by Daytona International Speedway often and hears the roar of race cars from outside the gates but had never before been inside the “World Center of Racing.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets interview Vikings' Flores and McCown and Packers' Hafley for their head coaching job
item.description: The New York Jets interviewed Minnesota Vikings defensive coordinator Brian Flores and quarterbacks coach Josh McCown and Green Bay Packers defensive coordinator Jeff Hafley for their head coach vacancy.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sixers center Joel Embiid to miss upcoming road trip with swelling in his left knee
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid again has swelling in his left knee and will miss the Philadelphia 76ers’ upcoming road trip, the latest injury setback for the All-Star center who has played in only 13 games this season. Embiid had been sidelined for the last six games with a sprained left foot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Aggies six-game winning streak ends at UNLV, 65-62
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State basketball team suffered just its second loss of the season Wednesday night, falling at UNLV, 65-62. Tucker Anderson led the Aggies with 19 points, but the Aggies missed its last six shots of the game, and dropped to 16-2 on the season. Dedan Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' 2024 first-round pick reflects on rookie year
item.description: Rookie center Graham Barton has taken the NFL by storm and reflected on his first year in the league.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mike McCarthy not returning as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy is not returning as head coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Single-match tickets for San Diego FC games now available
item.description: The 2025 inaugural season for San Diego FC is just around the corner and fans can now purchase single-match tickets for all 21 home games.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9
